title: ProjectSystem config
description: Per-project configuration that, composed with project-entity.base.schema.json, forms the effective ProjectEntity contract for one project. This is the ONLY place project-specific vocabulary lives: which kinds exist, the per-kind status enums and folders, body-section conventions, the tag registry, milestone markers, rel->kind target rules, and render metadata. The framework core is identical across projects; only this file changes.

project.description: Short identifier for the consuming project (e.g. 'project-system', 'soul-steel'). Display/label only.

projectRoot.description: Optional. Path to the directory that contains _project/, relative to this config file. Defaults to '.' (config sits at the project root). Overridable at the CLI with --root.

demo.description: Optional. Marks this config as describing a DEMONSTRATION / FIXTURE consumer (an in-repo example used to exercise the engines), NOT a production planning surface. The drift check derives demo-ness from this flag: a demo is validated every run but excluded from the consumer publish-trigger count, and runs under the demos-only smoke. Default false. The framework's own dogfood (`project-system`) and real consumers (e.g. soul-steel) omit it.

kinds.description: Ordered map of entity kind -> its rules. Insertion order is the display/auto-placement order. Each key is a kind name; each kind owns a folder under _project/.

sectionHints.description: Optional per-section authoring hints (section name -> placeholder text the scaffolder drops into a new entity's body). Overrides the scaffolder's built-in hints; useful for sections whose starter content is structured (e.g. a `## Workflow` swimlane stub).

tagRegistry.description: Known tag keys. Known keys have their VALUES validated; unknown keys are allowed but surfaced (info). Keys that shadow a primitive are rejected by the base schema.

relTargetKinds.description: For each rel in the base vocabulary, what its target must be: an array of kind names (target must resolve to a file of one of those kinds), or the literal 'marker' (a milestone marker), 'external' (off-graph ref; resolves only if it looks internal), or 'any'.

milestones.description: The known milestone markers (e.g. ['M1','M2']). A `milestone` link to a marker outside this set is a warning, not an error. Empty/omitted => any marker shape (e.g. M\d+) is accepted with an unknown-milestone warning.

milestonePattern.description: Regex (string) a milestone marker must match to be recognized as a marker at all. Default '^M\\d+$'.

proseStatusEnforcement.description: Whether the prose '**Status:**' header must agree with the frontmatter status, and at what severity.

swimlaneLaneKinds.description: Allowed values for a swimlane lane's `kind` (the actor type) on a carriesSwimlanes kind. An unknown kind is a warning, never an error. Default ['human','ai','system','tool','neutral'] (the @trembus/ui Swimlane vocabulary).

swimlaneEnforcement.description: Whether/at what severity a carriesSwimlanes kind's `## Workflow` swimlane block is structurally validated (required lane/step fields, unique ids, lane + to[] references resolve). Referential breaks use this severity; advisory issues (unknown lane kind/status, unreachable steps) stay warnings. Mirrors proseStatusEnforcement.

render.description: Optional. Drives the hub dashboard renderer. Entirely project-agnostic: a brand string, accent tone, and editorial copy. By default kinds are auto-placed into the hub's hex slots in declared order; `hex` overrides that with a curated layout. The slot-naming is an internal adapter concern, never surfaced here.

centerName.description: Label for the center tile (the contract). Default 'ProjectEntity'.

workflowSection.description: Body section a swimlane lives in. Default 'Workflow'. Parsed once at load into entity.workflow.

hex.description: Optional curated hex layout. Absent → auto-place one petal per kind-with-entities + a tooling petal. Present → place the declared petals in slot order.

petals.description: Up to 6 petals in slot order. Each is either an entity-kind tile (`kind`) or a Claude Code control-surface tile (`facet`: commands · workflows · hooks · guide), counted and detailed live by render-hub.

kind.description: An entity kind name (must exist in config.kinds).

facet.description: A control-surface facet: commands/workflows/hooks read from the project's .claude/; guide is the framework & naming reference derived from the config + base schema.

facets.description: Optional per-facet editorial overrides (tag/name/sub/dot/note/sources). `workflows.builtins` declares built-in workflow entries counted alongside entity ## Workflow blocks.

nav.description: Optional curated nav/tab bar. Absent → the app derives one: Overview + Progress, an auto-tab per kind not shown by a special panel, then Workflows if any swimlane exists. Each entry is either a built-in panel or a generic table over one or more kinds.

panel.description: A built-in bespoke panel the app renders itself.

label.description: Tab label for a generic entity-table tab.

kinds.description: Kinds listed in this generic table tab.

folder.description: The subfolder under _project/ that holds this kind (e.g. 'decisions'). Identity: kind is derived from this folder.

status.description: The per-kind status enum. status is the single State axis; it ranges over exactly these values for this kind.

initialStatus.description: The 'born' status a freshly scaffolded entity gets. Must be in `status`. Defaults to status[0].

filename.description: Filename scheme the scaffolder uses: 'serial' (NNNN-slug, zero-padded running number), 'date-slug' (YYYY-MM-DD-slug), or 'slug' (bare slug). Default 'slug'.

serialPad.description: For filename:'serial', how many digits to pad to. Default 4.

requiredSections.description: Body sections whose absence is a WARNING (never an error) — the empirically-universal core for this kind. Body structure is convention, not contract.

scaffoldSections.description: The fuller per-kind template the scaffolder writes at CREATE time. Supersets requiredSections so a fresh scaffold has zero missing-section warnings. Defaults to requiredSections.

carriesSwimlanes.description: True when entities of this kind ARE workflows — their `## Workflow` swimlane is the entity's reason to exist (e.g. the 'workflow' kind). The Command Center leads its workflow picker with these; other kinds' inline `## Workflow` blocks follow. Default false.

render.description: Optional render metadata for this kind's hub tile: accent dot color and human labels. NO slot/position — the renderer auto-places kinds in declared order.

dot.description: Accent hex for the tile dot.

tone.description: Optional explicit lineage tone for this kind's entities (accent|info|success|warning|neutral). Escape hatch — by default the tone is derived from `dot`. `danger` is reserved for errors.

values.description: For type:'enum', the allowed values (invalid value => error).

lintAgainst.description: For type:'string', familiar values. An unfamiliar value warns (still allowed) unless unknownAllowed is true.

unknownAllowed.description: When true, values outside lintAgainst are allowed silently (no warning). Default: warn on unfamiliar.
